Bash(python << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import shutil

ASSETS = "D:/projects/Kn_project/k-front/assets/images"
IOS = "D:/projects/Kn_project/k-front/ios/Runner/Assets.xcassets"

# Копируем тёмный логотип в LaunchImage imageset
logo_bt = Image.open\(f"{ASSETS}/knoty_logo_bt.png"\)
logo_bt.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchImage.imageset/LaunchImageDark.png"\)
logo_bt.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchImage.imageset/LaunchImageDark@2x.png"\)
logo_bt.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchImage.imageset/LaunchImageDark@3x.png"\)

# Маленький Canons для iOS \(50% от оригинала, как и на Android\)
canons = Image.open\(f"{ASSETS}/Canons.png"\)
w, h = canons.size
canons_small = canons.resize\(\(w // 2, h // 2\), Image.LANCZOS\)
canons_small.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchBranding.imageset/Canons.png"\)
canons_small.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchBranding.imageset/Canons@2x.png"\)
canons_small.save\(f"{IOS}/LaunchBranding.imageset/Canons@3x.png"\)

print\("Done, Canons small:", canons_small.size\)
EOF)

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

ASSETS = 'D:/projects/Kn_project/k-front/assets/images'
RES = 'D:/projects/Kn_project/k-front/android/app/src/main/res'

logo = Image.open\(ASSETS + '/knoty_logo.png'\)
logo_bt = Image.open\(ASSETS + '/knoty_logo_bt.png'\)
canons = Image.open\(ASSETS + '/Canons.png'\)

targets = {
    'mdpi':    \(160, 80\),
    'hdpi':    \(240, 120\),
    'xhdpi':   \(320, 160\),
    'xxhdpi':  \(480, 240\),
    'xxxhdpi': \(640, 320\),
}

for d, \(ls, cs\) in targets.items\(\):
    folder = RES + '/drawable-' + d
    night  = RES + '/drawable-night-' + d
    os.makedirs\(night, exist_ok=True\)

    logo.resize\(\(ls, ls\), Image.LANCZOS\).save\(folder + '/splash.png'\)
    logo_bt.resize\(\(ls, ls\), Image.LANCZOS\).save\(night + '/splash.png'\)

    ratio = cs / canons.size[0]
    ch = int\(canons.size[1] * ratio\)
    small = canons.resize\(\(cs, ch\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    small.save\(folder + '/canons_splash.png'\)
    small.save\(night + '/canons_splash.png'\)
    print\(d + ': logo=' + str\(ls\) + ' canons=' + str\(cs\) + 'x' + str\(ch\)\)

print\('Done'\)
")

c = Image.open\(ASSETS + '/Canons.png'\)
Image.open\(ASSETS + '/Canons.png'\).resize\(\(160, int\(c.size[1]*160/c.size[0]\)\), Image.LANCZOS\).save\(RES + '/canons_splash.png'\)
print\('done'\)
")
